# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- Building a desktop quiz app called "CowMe" with: C++20/23 (MSVC), Qt 6 with QML, SQLite via Qt SQL, CMake. Clean Architecture (core/application/infrastructure/presentation layers), MVVM pattern, Repository pattern, DI (constructor injection). Design patterns: Factory, Strategy, Observer, State, Builder, Command, Singleton. Namespace: cowme::core, etc. Use modern C++20/23 idioms (concepts, ranges, std::expected, std::format, structured bindings). QML for views, C++ for logic/ViewModels.
